title: The Secret in Their Eyes
posterAlt: The Secret in Their Eyes (2009) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Hoping to put to rest years of unease concerning a past case, retired criminal investigator Benjamín begins writing a novel based on the unsolved mystery of a newlywed’s rape and murder. With the help of a former colleague, judge Irene, he attempts to make sense of the past.
synopsis: Released in 2009, The Secret in Their Eyes is a mystery, thriller and drama film from Spain. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
